zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich II of Wettin於0985年出生在德國薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯維廷時，他的父親Dedo I von Wettin36歲，母親Thietburga von Haldensleben30歲。他於大約1016年與Mathilde von Meissen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1032年在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇被列為margrave of lusatia。他去世於1034年11月19日在薩辛享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich II of Wettin于0985年出生在德国薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯維廷时，他的父亲Dedo I von Wettin36岁，母亲Thietburga von Haldensleben30岁。他于大约1016年与Mathilde von Meissen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1032年在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇被列为margrave of lusatia。他去世于1034年11月19日在薩辛享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Wettin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Johan, Tor.
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’. Compare Westen .

variants.name: Westen
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of the very many places in England named in Old English as ‘the western enclosure’, from west ‘west’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich II of Wettin was born in 0985, in Wettin, Saalkreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, his father, Dedo I von Wettin, was 36 and his mother, Thietburga von Haldensleben, was 30. He married Mathilde von Meissen about 1016. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1032, his occupation is listed as margrave of lusatia in Holy Roman Empire. He died on 19 November 1034, in Saxony, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich II of Wettin est né en 0985, à Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Dedo I von Wettin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Thietburga von Haldensleben, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Meissen environ 1016. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1032, sa profession de son indiquée est margrave of lusatia à Saint-Empire romain. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1034, à Sachsen, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich II of Wettin 0985 in Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dedo I von Wettin 36 und seine Mutter Thietburga von Haldensleben 30. Er hat um 1016 Mathilde von Meissen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1032 ist sein Beruf als margrave of lusatia in Heiliges Römisches Reich aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. November 1034 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Sachsen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich II of Wettin è nato il nel 0985 nel Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, il suo padre, Dedo I von Wettin, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Thietburga von Haldensleben, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Meissen circa 1016. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1032, la sua occupazione è indicata come margrave of lusatia nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Morì il 19 novembre 1034, nel Sachsen, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich II of Wettinが0985年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトサアルクレイスウエッティンで生まれた時，父Dedo I von Wettinは36歳，母Thietburga von Haldenslebenは30歳であった。約1016年にMathilde von Meissenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1032年，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでの職業はmargrave of lusatiaと記録されている。彼は1034年11月19日にサチセンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich II of Wettin(이)가 0985년 독일 작센-아할트 사알크레이스 w틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dedo I von Wettin(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Thietburga von Haldensleben(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1016년 Mathilde von Meissen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1032년, 그의 직업은 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 margrave of lusatia이었다. 그는 1034년 11월 19일 작센에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich II of Wettin nasceu em 0985, em Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Dedo I von Wettin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Thietburga von Haldensleben, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Meissen aproximadamente 1016. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1032, sua profissão aparece como margrave of lusatia em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1034, em Sachsen, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich II of Wettin родился в 0985 г. в местности веттинь, саалкрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия, его отцу по имени Dedo I von Wettin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Thietburga von Haldensleben, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Meissen около 1016 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1032 году он работал по профессии margrave of lusatia в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. Он умер 19 ноября 1034 г. в местности сачсен в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.1032-1034: mai le 1032 e o'o I le 1034

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich II of Wettin nació en 0985, en Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, su papá, Dedo I von Wettin, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Thietburga von Haldensleben, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Meissen aproximadamente 1016. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1032, su ocupación registrada era margrave of lusatia en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1034, en Sachsen, a la edad de 49 años.
